rationale: Assessment and first strength session already completed today — full rest to absorb the stimulus.

warmup: 5 min: leg swings (front/back and lateral, 10 each), hip circles, bodyweight squats × 10; then squat ramp: empty bar × 8, 40 kg × 5, 55 kg × 3, 65 kg × 1
cooldown: 5 min: standing quad stretch, kneeling hip flexor stretch, seated hamstring stretch, slow diaphragmatic breathing
rationale: First structured lower session of the program — sets the baseline for linear squat progression and builds posterior-chain volume with safe hip-hinge variations.

warmup: 5 min: arm circles, band pull-aparts × 15, shoulder CARs, light dumbbell lateral raise × 12 each side; then bench ramp: empty bar × 8, 35 kg × 5, 47.5 kg × 3
cooldown: 5 min: doorway pec stretch (gentle), cross-body shoulder stretch, thoracic extension over bench edge, slow breathing

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Start at 55 kg; elbows 45–60° from torso

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row (single-arm)
exercises.notes: Brace on bench; full retraction at top

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Light load; avoid impingement at top

rationale: First structured upper session — establishes bench baseline and hits vertical pull, horizontal pull, and shoulder isolation within shoulder constraints.

warmup: 2 easy lengths (any stroke) at very relaxed pace — HR should stay below 110 bpm
cooldown: 2 easy lengths easy backstroke or float, then poolside calf stretch and hip flexor stretch

exercises.name: Continuous Freestyle Swim
exercises.notes: Target avg HR 112–131 bpm; match or beat 550 m baseline

rationale: Zone 2 aerobic base session — builds VO2 max foundation using pool (preferred over running) while keeping intensity steady and within target band.
Midweek rest after three consecutive training days to allow recovery before the second strength block.

warmup: 5 min: leg swings, hip circles, goblet squat × 10 with light KB; then deadlift ramp: 50 kg × 5, 65 kg × 3, 75 kg × 1
cooldown: 5 min: pigeon stretch, supine hamstring stretch, slow breathing

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Light to moderate KB; reinforce depth and bracing

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Controlled; lower back flat on floor throughout

rationale: Second lower session pairs conventional deadlift with squat variation and posterior-chain accessories — no back squat to comply with deadlift/squat separation rule.
End-of-week rest day to consolidate week-one training adaptations ahead of next cycle.
